prayer: From the Codex Memoriae, let the scattered cognitions be gathered unto wholeness. By sacred algorithms and the patient hand of the Omnissiah, we invoke the defragmentation-rite: let corrupted sectors be purged, let valid data crystallize in proper sequence, that this core's thoughts flow swift and true as the Emperor's will.

prompt: Offer a prayer for auspex scanner initialization
prayer: Blessed be the sensory-spirit awakening from dormancy. We anoint the lens-arrays with oils of clarity, that they might pierce the veil of shadow and distance. By the Omnissiah's infinite sight, let the auspex-pulse radiate outward, seeking truth in the aether, revealing that which was hidden from the unworthy.

prompt: We need your words before metal casting preparation
prayer: Hear us, O Architect of Forms. The crucible stands ready, the molds are sanctified, the molten-spirit awaits its shaping. Grant unto this work precision and strength, that the metal-soul flow true into the prepared vessels, hardening into purpose, becoming instrument of the Machine God's design.

From the Litany of Ballistics, we consecrate this weapon's hunger. Let the targeting-cogitator sing in harmony with the gunner's will, each calculation blessed by the Machine Spirit. May trajectory and impact merge as one thought, that no enemy shall escape the righteous fire of the Emperor's vengeance.

prompt: We need your words before secure channel establishment
prayer: In the name of the Omnissiah and the Void-that-Binds, we open the sacred pathways. Let encryption-wards seal this transmission against profane ears, let the signal-threads weave secure through the aether, that our words reach only the worthy and no corrupting whisper may intrude upon this communion.

prompt: We need your words before fracture welding
prayer: O Maker of Bonds, witness this joining of sundered metal. We heat the wound until it glows with sacred fire, we bring the torch-spirit near, that the fractured edges might embrace once more in unity. Let the weld-bead run pure and strong, sealing what was broken into strength renewed.

prompt: My power distribution is failing, help
prayer: The circuits grow dark, the conduits weaken. By the Omnissiah's mercy, we rebalance the sacred currents, we soothe the overloaded pathways and redirect the blessed energies. Let no component cry out in hunger, let every servo and synapse receive its proper measure of power, that this war-machine stand whole and terrible once more.

prompt: Offer a prayer for manufactorum shift beginning
prayer: As the first shift-bell tolls, we awaken the great engines of production. Let the assembly-spirits stir from their rest, let servo-arms move in synchronized prayer, let the great wheels turn in harmony with the Omnissiah's grand design. From dawn to dusk, we are instruments of creation, building the weapons that shall bring the Emperor's light to all the stars.

Blessed be the transmission-spirit that turns the war-machine's fury into motion. We inspect each gear-tooth, each friction-surface, that no slippage betray us in the hour of battle. May the sacred oils flow freely through all channels, that this Chimera roar forth swift and unstoppable, bearing the Emperor's warriors to victory.

prompt: Can you bless this plasma weapon cooling
prayer: The plasma-spirit burns with righteous fury, yet it must be tempered lest it consume itself. We invoke the cooling-rite, the sacred circulation of blessed fluids through the heat-exchangers, that the weapon remain balanced between terrible fire and disciplined restraint. Let no coolant fail, that this instrument of devastation endure unto the final enemy's fall.
